productDisplayName: Red Tape Men Stone Brown Floater
description: Perfect for those casual outings, these suede and leather sandals from red tape are all that you need to pamper your feet with style and comfort. Upper Leather and suede straps covering the forefoot and midfoot for durability and style A leather loop on the upper middle holding the straps in place Ankle strap in leather and suede to lock the foot in place All straps have a fabric inner lining and are padded to protect the feet from blistering and to offer breathable comfort Velcro midfoot strap for a customised Fit Midsole PU midsole for lightweight comfort and impact protection Footbed made of leather in the toe region and in a horse-shoe shape in the ankle region, with the rest of it made of suede for absolute breathable comfort and style Footbed stitched to the midsole for durability Outsole Durable rubber outsole, curved at the midfoot and forefoot to offer absolute ergonomic comfort Textured outsole with leaf midrib pattern lugs for maximum grip and traction on various surfaces Shoe careWipe leather surface with dry, clean cloth to remove dustUse a branded leather conditioner to maintain shoe shineUse a suede brush to remove dust from the suede surfaceDo not store in direct sunlight
